condition_vocab.leg=floating: the FpML rate stream/leg contains <floatingRateCalculation> (floating leg) → CDM FloatingRateSpecification payout
condition_vocab.leg=fixed: the FpML rate stream/leg contains <fixedRateSchedule>/<fixedRate> (fixed leg) → CDM FixedRateSpecification payout
condition_vocab.side=payer: the FpML reference sits under a payer* element → CDM payerReceiver.payer
condition_vocab.side=receiver: the FpML reference sits under a receiver* element → CDM payerReceiver.receiver
condition_vocab.product=[…]: the edge only holds when the FpML trade product is one of the listed elements
